description: american tourister is a brand from samsonite Corporation, which has been in existence since 1933. It is a one stop shop for all your travelling bags, sling bags and back packs. At American Tourister we are proud to make durable and stylish bags to suit any occasion. Height: 37 cmWidth: 30 cmDepth: 14 cmWarranty: 1 yearMade of polyester for durabilityOne main zipped compartment with two mesh separators and organizer pouchesOne zipped compartment on the frontOne zipped side pocketOne mesh bottle holderHaul loop for easy carryingAn adjustable shoulder strap made of polyesterBranded zips and branding on the strapBack padding for comfortCareClean with a damp cloth when necessary
